failedAssertions.reason: Local-mode indexing of the copied ripgrep/flask/fastify benchmark repos was repeatedly killed by the OS (exit -9/137), so the faithful 17-task Recall@5 reproduction could not produce usable indexes and recorded 0.0000.

The local-model initialization failure path exited cleanly but only reported `Failed to download ONNX model: Not a directory (os error 20)`; it did not name the expected cache path or provide remediation guidance.
A first cold-cache `cargo test --features local` run failed in `retrieval::search_service::tests::test_dimension_mismatch_and_inference` during ONNX data download; only a warm-cache rerun passed.

appliedUpdates.description: Added local-inference-specific CLI/MCP guidance covering shared default/local binaries, isolated HOME/model-cache strategy, concurrency limits, and assertion-specific verification patterns.

Recorded two observed local-inference frictions from flow reports: cold-cache `cargo test --features local` flakiness during model download and OS-killed local indexing on the 17-task benchmark subset.
